sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46014" key="e(yhth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑψ-ητής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n46014.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who smelts</tr_> ore, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0067.tlg001:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Agatharch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
